description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the google/dart:1.24.3 Docker image and defines a single build stage. Set a before_script that exports PUB_CACHE to .pub_cache/, runs pub version, pub get and pub upgrade, and configure a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME covering packages/, web/packages/ and .pub_cache/ with untracked files. Add a pages job in the build stage (tagged with docker) that executes pub build, removes any existing public directory, creates a new public folder, and moves the contents of build/web/* into public, then publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Configure the pages job to run only on the master branch.
